title: loom.lifecycle.ci v1
description: hearth-loom CI run outcome — EventCIPassed / EventCIFailed from the internal LifecycleEvent bus. Fires per CI run (typically post-push, pre-merge). Distinct from loom.lifecycle.pr.v1's ci_failed event, which fires only at PR-level transitions; this channel captures every CI run including non-PR ones (push-on-branch, retries). Source: /hearth-loom/prwatch.

task_id.description: Bead id this task is executing (e.g. nervous-bus-5o8)

execution_id.description: UUID v4 — correlates to loom.lifecycle.v1 execution

duration_seconds.description: Wall-clock seconds for the CI run; null if unknown at emit time

run_url.description: Link to the CI run (e.g. GitHub Actions workflow run URL)

commit_sha.description: Commit SHA the CI ran against

pr_number.description: PR number if the CI run is associated with a PR; null for branch/push runs

failure_summary.description: Short failure description for status=failed (truncated to 200 chars); null on pass
